title: gpt-oss-120B loads, serves and DECODES on an 8 GB laptop GPU (capacity result, not speed)
claim: A 120B-class MoE model boots, serves an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, and GENERATES coherent tokens on a single 8 GB consumer laptop GPU + system RAM, by streaming the MoE experts from NVMe. This is a CAPACITY result; sustained decode is modest by design.
model: gpt-oss-120b (MoE, 128 experts), MXFP4 native, 3 GGUF shards (~63.4 GB total)

machine.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Laptop GPU, 8188 MiB VRAM (nvidia-smi)

primary_measurement_sustained_n1.source: llama-server timings (predicted_per_second), read directly from the running server

corroboration_fresh_local_run.gpu_confirmed_nvidia_smi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Laptop GPU, 8188 MiB total, ~6900 MiB free at launch
corroboration_fresh_local_run.prompt: Explain in two sentences why the ocean is salty.
corroboration_fresh_local_run.coherent_answer: The ocean is salty because it contains dissolved minerals and salts that have been carried ...

warmup_decode.note: short warmup completion; a 16-token generation reads slightly faster than the 300-token sustained figure. The run re-confirmed load + serve + coherent generation on the 8 GB GPU, then was stopped to spare the machine before the full N=3 reps.

honest_caveats: CAPACITY, not speed: the headline is that a 120B-class model RUNS on an 8 GB laptop, NOT that it runs fast. Sustained decode is ~1.5 tok/s.
n=1 for the sustained 300-token figure. The 2026-06-29 local run independently re-confirmed that the model loads, serves and generates coherent text on the same 8 GB GPU.
NVMe-bound: with only 16 GB RAM, the experts are streamed from NVMe on every token (~0.66 s/token) — that is why it is slow. More RAM lifts it.
This is NOT the >=10 tok/s target. The 9-11 tok/s figures discussed in the project are projections, not measured here.
A higher 120B decode (7.62 tok/s) exists only on a datacenter GPU with 188 GB RAM (see runpod_64gb_validation.json) — a different machine, labelled as such.
The OpenAI-compatible endpoint served correctly; the boot/serve path was separately measured healthy 4x (see the project's e2e boot/serve record).
status: [MEASURED] gpt-oss-120B loads + serves + decodes on an RTX 4070 Laptop 8 GB; sustained decode 1.50 tok/s (n=1, NVMe-bound); coherent generation re-confirmed 2026-06-29.
